name: Leman Russ, Your Boastful Primarch
description:
"Does this make me a furry?" -Mark Applier.

[{[ FEM-PRIMARCH 6/20 ]}]

Can you tell that Leman Russ is my favourite? Anyway, this was actually the first fem-primarch I ever made, which is why it has a different first message than the others, so don't go asking about that! Anyway, any constructive criticism of how I build my bots is ALWAYS welcome, as well as you guys telling me about your chats! Don't leave out any juicy details!
